Interview Mastery
Rounds Questions Rubrics Profiles
Rounds Questions Rubrics Profiles

Interview Rounds

Each round is a structured 45-60 minute assessment with clear evaluation criteria. Use these as an interviewer to calibrate, or as a candidate to prepare.

01

Coding & DSA

60 min

Algorithms, data structures, complexity analysis. Test problem-solving under pressure with real LeetCode-style questions.

Arrays Trees Graphs DP Heap
02

Low-Level Design

45-60 min

Object-oriented design, SOLID principles, design patterns. Model real systems with clean class hierarchies.

OOP SOLID Patterns UML APIs
03

High-Level Design

45-60 min

Distributed systems, scalability, reliability. Architect systems handling millions of users.

Scaling Databases Caching Queues CDN
04

Infrastructure & CI/CD

45 min

Build pipelines, containerization, observability, deployment strategies, quality gates.

Docker K8s GitLab CI Terraform Monitoring
05

Behavioral

45 min

STAR method, leadership principles, conflict resolution, growth mindset.

STAR Leadership Conflict Growth Empathy
Interview Mastery

From silicon to cloud everything in between. A comprehensive, open-source interview preparation platform covering all engineering levels and domains.
